steps.title: The Eyes: Locate Emergency Shut-Off
steps.instruction: Locate the emergency shut-off. Tap the table to place the AR arrow on the shut-off location, then say Next.

steps.title: The Hands: Highlight Leaks or Damage
steps.instruction: Highlight any leaks or damage. Use your finger to circle the area on screen. Then say Clear to wipe the marks, and say Next.

steps.title: The Brain: Confirm Inspection Complete
steps.instruction: Confirm inspection complete. Say Next or Done to finish and generate the summary report.
